title: periploca multiflora
intro: Periploca multiflora, also known as the Chinese woodbine or poison wrightia, is a type of flowering plant that belongs to the family Apocynaceae. Traditionally, the plant has been used in Chinese medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiviral, and antibacterial properties. The health benefits of Periploca multiflora include reducing fever, treating various infections, and alleviating respiratory issues. Periploca multiflora can be prepared as a herbal tea, capsule, or tincture, and is often used in combination with other herbs to enhance its medicinal effects.
